scripts.mobile:sync: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.'); from scripts.app_server import _sync_web_to_docs,_sync_site_data_to_docs; _sync_web_to_docs(); _sync_site_data_to_docs(); print('synced')"
scripts.data:refresh: python3 scripts/app_server.py --auto-refresh full --port 8799 & sleep 1; curl -s -X POST 'http://127.0.0.1:8799/api/refresh?mode=full' || python3 scripts/update_daily.py && python3 scripts/build_site_data.py
